objective: sketch a custom Circuit flow builder UI
preview_instructions: Open docs/release/proofs/runs/prototype/run/prototype-files/index.html in a browser or inspect the file directly.
build_followup_prompt: Build from the Prototype artifact in docs/release/proofs/runs/prototype/run/prototype-files. Preserve the useful interaction from docs/release/proofs/runs/prototype/run/prototype-files/index.html, but implement it as production code only after reviewing the Prototype result and limitations.
risks: Prototype polish can be mistaken for production readiness
The artifact may validate the interaction idea without covering integration cost
